buildCommand: cd frontend && yarn install && CI=false GENERATE_SOURCEMAP=false yarn build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://va.vercel-scripts.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://vitals.vercel-insights.com https://va.vercel-scripts.com; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests;
